summary: Successfully tested 3 new features: Welcome email on registration, Formateur email sending, and Document management (upload/list/download/delete). All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend UI tested and working correctly. Fixed critical bug: db.groupes changed to db.groupes_formation and removed duplicate endpoint.
seed_data_creation: Test documents uploaded to group and stagiaire using TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features are working: (1) Welcome email is sent asynchronously during stagiaire registration, (2) Formateurs can send emails to stagiaires via /formateur/send-email, (3) Document management is complete with upload (multipart/form-data), listing (by category), download, and delete. The uploads directory is /app/uploads/documents/. Fixed bug where db.groupes was used instead of db.groupes_formation.

welcome_email.on_registration: PASSED - Email sent asynchronously, doesn't block registration

formateur_send_email.email_sending: PASSED - Uses Resend API with HTML template

document_management.stagiaire_list: PASSED - GET /stagiaire/documents (shows group and individual docs)

frontend_ui.formateur_documents_page: PASSED - Upload form, document list, download/delete buttons
frontend_ui.formateur_send_email_page: PASSED - Email form with groupe selection help
frontend_ui.stagiaire_documents_page: PASSED - Category tabs (Tous, Cours, Certificats, Évaluations), download buttons
frontend_ui.navigation_links: PASSED - Documents and Envoyer email for formateurs, Mes documents for stagiaires

bugs_fixed.issue: Wrong MongoDB collection name in document upload endpoints
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed db.groupes to db.groupes_formation in 3 places (lines 2190, 2202, 2301)

bugs_fixed.issue: Duplicate /formateur/send-email endpoint (one with body, one with query params)
bugs_fixed.fix: Removed first duplicate that used EmailSendRequest body, kept query params version used by frontend
